[[Major/Legends|Major]] '''Stipling''' was an Imperial Officer working for the [[Imperial Resource Procurement Bureau]] during the height of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. He was in charge of a detail searching for the raw materials for the Imperial war machine.
He and his team were captured by [[Bel Att]] in [[Yen-2]]. The destruction of their shuttle killed them all.

==Sources==
